title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Mastek Tech Limited
body: "Application number 4980  Applicant Mastek Limited objected to the name used by Mastek Tech Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 21 January 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Mastek Tech Limited is changed to 15551986 LTD. "
